calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Karen Farnsworth.
Petitioners: TO THAN HUYNH & HA HUE HUYN, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: THUONG LE HUYNH AND CAM THIEN HUYNH AKA THIEN CAM HUYNH, was sworn and examined with help of an Interpreter Jenny Yau.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name fo the Minors from THUONG LE HUYNH TO YUKI HUYNH AND CAM THIEN HUYNH AKA THIEN CAM HUYNH TO RANDALL HUYNH.
Decree signed in open court.
